faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Merrick typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Merrick are completed in one day, with heat treatments typically taking 6-8 hours. Chemical treatments may require multiple visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart. After treatment, you can usually return to your home within a few hours, though we provide specific instructions based on the method used.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our certified technicians. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. For chemical applications, we provide clear instructions on when it's safe to re-enter your home, typically within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment services in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our bed bug treatments with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period, we'll retreat your Merrick home at no additional cost. We also provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination and offer prevention tips to keep your home bed bug-free.
